title: senecio paramensis
intro: Senecio paramensis, also known as Andean groundsel, is a perennial herb native to the high-altitude regions of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senecio paramensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which can also be combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
